name: Akhilesh Bisane
text: We came to Shubham Hi-Tech Hospital during a very stressful time. My wife was in severe pain and had been diagnosed with an endometriosis cyst and fibroid. From the moment we met Dr. Manan Boob, a massive weight was lifted off our shoulders — he thoroughly explained every single detail, giving us a clear and comforting understanding of the condition. He brilliantly performed the surgery with immense accuracy and skill, completely relieving my wife from her pain. Our heartfelt thanks also go to Dr. Manjushree Boob for her exceptional help, warmth, and excellent consultation throughout this journey.

name: Aditya Tiwari
text: Our hospital stay for the C-section was a memorable and reassuring experience. The doctors provided excellent care throughout the procedure and recovery period. Their professionalism, compassion, and constant support helped make the journey smooth and comfortable for both mother and baby. We are grateful for the attentive care and guidance that ensured a safe delivery and a positive start to this new chapter in our lives.

name: Ayush Soitkar
text: My mother received excellent care at Shubham Hi-Tech Hospital. A sincere thank you to Dr. Manan Boob, Dr. Murlidhar, and Dr. Manjushree for their outstanding healthcare and support. The hospital features excellent, high-tech facilities, and the well-trained staff provides top-notch patient care.

name: Sonal M. Nandedkar
text: Shubham Hospital has an excellent and supportive team. Manjushree mam provided proper guidance and consultation throughout my pregnancy, and I had a safe delivery even though I had blood issues. The nursing staff is kind, caring, and very supportive. I would highly recommend Shubham Hospital to anyone looking for good consultation, safe baby delivery, and a budget-friendly package.

name: Prashant Turuk
text: After 13 years of infertility, we are blessed with success in our IVF cycle. Entirely grateful to the doctor and IVF team for their support. Forever thankful for this gift of my life.

name: Amol Potdar
text: Got the best treatment at a reasonable price. Totally satisfied. I request everyone to please visit for an authentic treatment.
